name: Bambuser AB
description: Bambuser AB is a Swedish software company that specializes in interactive live video streaming. The company provides a live video shopping platform that enables retailers, brands, and e-commerce businesses to host live shopping events on their websites and mobile applications. Founded in 2007, Bambuser has transitioned from a general mobile live-streaming platform to a leading provider of live commerce solutions, helping businesses engage audiences, showcase products, and drive sales in real-time.
